Headline: #24 Wentworth Temporary Reroute at Wentworth/Cermak
ShortDescription: #24 Wentworth buses are temporarily rerouted via Wentworth, 26th, State, Cermak, Clark, then resume their normal route due to construction near Wentworth/Cermak

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#24 Wentworth buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Wentworth, 26th, State, Cermak, Clark, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Wentworth/Cermak.
